'''Green One''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Golan II Space Defense SpaceGun]] stationed at the [[Bilbringi Shipyards]]. It was destroyed at the [[Battle of Bilbringi (9 ABY)|Battle of Bilbringi]] by ''[[Tyrant's Bane]]'', ''[[Liberty Star]]'', and [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]].

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Isard's Revenge]]''
